div.h3: Intel SSE2 Vector Register Byte-Level Specification

div.p: Broadcast Logic: Input scalar is duplicated across the entire 128-bit span. Used for SIMD masking or global scaling.
Cache Boundary (64B) Loads crossing 0x3F into 0x40 result in Dual Cache-Line Fetch Penalty.

g.text: 4 X FLOAT32 (LANES: F0 | F1 | F2 | F3)
4 X INT32 (LANES: I0 | I1 | I2 | I3)
